name: San Fernando Valley Pinquitos
recipeIngredient: 1 pound pinquito beans (or pinto beans), soaked overnight
fresh water or broth - to cover
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the beans and cover well with fresh water. Let the beans soak overnight.
2. After the beans have soaked, drain them thoroughly.
3. Cover the drained beans well with more fresh water. Bring the beans to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and simmer for 1 to 2 hours, or until tender. Drain the beans.
5. In a separate pan, combine all remaining ingredients: sliced apples, tomato juice, brown sugar, minced garlic, sliced onions, and port sausage (mix well).
6. Bring the mixture to a boil and mix it with the drained beans.
7. Allow the dish to simmer for at least 2 hours before serving.
Note: You might want to degrease the dish before serving, if following Mrs. Brown's method.
